summary: Paddy Custody Register Fix - Iteration 195 PASSED. All 13 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Released (Qtl) column now shows data from paddy_release collection with 'Paddy Release | RO: ... | Qty: ...' format instead of milling_entries.
seed_data_creation: None - existing test data used (RO-001, 10000 Qtl paddy_release entry)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Paddy Custody Register fix verified. Key changes: (1) Released (Qtl) now comes from paddy_release collection (qty_qtl field) instead of milling_entries (paddy_input_qntl). (2) Description for released rows changed from 'Milling (...)' to 'Paddy Release | RO: ... | Qty: ... Qtl'. (3) Received (Qtl) still comes from mill_entries tp_weight (unchanged). (4) Balance = Received - Released running total. Test data: 1 paddy_release entry (RO-001, 10000 Qtl, date 2026-04-06, kms_year 2026-2027).

Released description format - PASS (contains 'Paddy Release | RO:' format)
